inputs.label: Desired Molarity
inputs.businessContext: Target concentration of the electrolyte solution in moles per liter

inputs.label: Solution Volume
inputs.businessContext: Final volume of the solution to prepare

inputs.label: Solute Purity
inputs.businessContext: Purity percentage of the solid solute (e.g., 99.5 means 99.5% pure)

inputs.label: Molecular Weight (Anhydrous)
inputs.businessContext: Molar mass of the anhydrous solute

inputs.label: Water of Hydration
inputs.businessContext: Number of water molecules per formula unit (e.g., 5 for CuSO4·5H2O; 0 for anhydrous)
